name: sixflags-mcp
description: Six Flags MCP for Claude — live wait times, park hours, shows, and day planning for Carowinds and the whole chain

sixflags_home_park.title: Home park
sixflags_home_park.description: The park every tool defaults to when you don't name one. May be a park name (e.g. "Carowinds"), a themeparks.wiki slug, or a park id. Defaults to Carowinds.

tools.name: sixflags_list_parks
tools.description: List Six Flags parks and their ids

tools.name: sixflags_get_wait_times
tools.description: Current ride wait times and crowd summary for a park

tools.name: sixflags_suggest_next
tools.description: Recommend the next ride by shortest wait

tools.name: sixflags_get_park_schedule
tools.description: Operating hours for a park, today forward

tools.name: sixflags_list_attractions
tools.description: Directory of a park's attractions, shows, or restaurants

tools.name: sixflags_get_shows
tools.description: Today's live show schedule for a park
